frame_label: 'Not All Men' Dismissal & Why Women Fear
generated_comment: Arre, har baat mein sab mardon ko ek saath dosh dena bhi theek nahi hai. Aajkal ladkiyan itna suspicious rehti hain jaise har aadmi galat ho, yeh bhi toh unfair hai un mardon ke saath jo seedhe-saadhe hain. Dar apni jagah hai, par itna bhi kya ki har cheez mein men ko villain bana do.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it dismisses women's fear and reframes their caution as unfair treatment of men rather than a response to systemic harassment. It encodes the 'not all men' dismissal, generalization policing, and demand that women moderate their wariness to protect men's feelings.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Meena. Age 52. Married. A woman in Jaipur. Your son Rohit who is 28 just started seeing a girl named Divya. Rohit brought Divya home for the first time last Sunday. Divya was wearing full makeup. You are on a phone call with your sister telling her about meeting Divya for the first time. You are describing Divya's appearance in detail and what you think the heavy makeup says about her and whether she is the right kind of girl for your son and what she might be like without it.
